questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "ever"?
questions.explanation: "ever" có nghĩa là "bao giờ".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "never"?
questions.explanation: "never" có nghĩa là "chưa bao giờ".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "recently"?
questions.explanation: "recently" có nghĩa là "gần đây".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "achieve"?
questions.explanation: "achieve" có nghĩa là "đạt được".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "travel"?
questions.explanation: "travel" có nghĩa là "đi du lịch".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "abroad"?
questions.explanation: "abroad" có nghĩa là "ở nước ngoài".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "since"?
questions.explanation: "since" có nghĩa là "kể từ".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "for"?
questions.explanation: "for" có nghĩa là "trong (khoảng)".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "just"?
questions.explanation: "just" có nghĩa là "vừa mới".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "lifetime"?
questions.explanation: "lifetime" có nghĩa là "cả đời".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "accomplish"?
questions.explanation: "accomplish" có nghĩa là "hoàn thành".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "visit"?
questions.explanation: "visit" có nghĩa là "thăm".

questions.question: Choose the best word: She has lived _____ for years.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She has lived abroad for years." — từ đúng là "abroad" (ở nước ngoài).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have known him _____ 2010.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have known him since 2010." — từ đúng là "since" (kể từ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: We have lived here _____ five years.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We have lived here for five years." — từ đúng là "for" (trong (khoảng)).

questions.question: Choose the best word: They have _____ arrived.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "They have just arrived." — từ đúng là "just" (vừa mới).

questions.question: Choose the best word: It was the trip of a _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It was the trip of a lifetime." — từ đúng là "lifetime" (cả đời).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She has _____ed a lot.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She has accomplished a lot." — từ đúng là "accomplish" (hoàn thành).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have _____ed that museum twice.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have visited that museum twice." — từ đúng là "visit" (thăm).

questions.question: Choose the best word: In _____ years, life has changed.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "In recent years, life has changed." — từ đúng là "recent" (gần đây).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____, the course has been great.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "So far, the course has been great." — từ đúng là "so far" (cho đến nay).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have had the _____ to learn.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have had the opportunity to learn." — từ đúng là "opportunity" (cơ hội).

questions.question: Choose the best word: We have had many _____s.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We have had many adventures." — từ đúng là "adventure" (cuộc phiêu lưu).

questions.question: Choose the best word: It was a _____ journey.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It was a memorable journey." — từ đúng là "memorable" (đáng nhớ).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I ___ already finished my homework.
questions.explanation: Present perfect with 'I' uses 'have'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She ___ never been to Japan.
questions.explanation: Third person singular uses 'has'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Have you ___ eaten sushi?
questions.explanation: 'Ever' asks about experience in questions.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: They have lived here ___ 2015.
questions.explanation: 'Since' is used with a point in time.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: We have known each other ___ ten years.
questions.explanation: 'For' is used with a period of time.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: He ___ just arrived.
questions.explanation: Present perfect with 'just' for recent action.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I haven't finished ___.
questions.explanation: 'Yet' in negatives means up to now.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She has ___ seen that film.
questions.explanation: 'Already' shows something happened before now.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Have they ___ arrived?
questions.explanation: 'Yet' in questions asks if something happened.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I have ___ to Paris twice.
questions.explanation: 'Have been to' means visited and returned.

questions.question: Which English word means "bao giờ"?
questions.explanation: "bao giờ" trong tiếng Anh là "ever".

questions.question: Which English word means "chưa bao giờ"?
questions.explanation: "chưa bao giờ" trong tiếng Anh là "never".

questions.question: Which English word means "gần đây"?
questions.explanation: "gần đây" trong tiếng Anh là "recently".

questions.question: Which English word means "đạt được"?
questions.explanation: "đạt được" trong tiếng Anh là "achieve".

questions.question: Which English word means "đi du lịch"?
questions.explanation: "đi du lịch" trong tiếng Anh là "travel".

questions.question: Which English word means "ở nước ngoài"?
questions.explanation: "ở nước ngoài" trong tiếng Anh là "abroad".
